Zoom AI Productivity Suite

Integrated AI applications that convert meeting discussions into actionable tasks and content across Zoom Canvas, Slides, Sheets, and Paper.

Category Productivity
Pricing $10/user/month (standalone or add-on, includes AI credits)
Released June 1, 2026
Visit Zoom AI Productivity Suite →

About Zoom AI Productivity Suite

As of June 5, 2026, Zoom has launched its AI Productivity Suite, designed to help teams move from discussions to deliverables without losing context. The suite includes Zoom Canvas (formerly Zoom Docs) for turning meeting insights into documents, project trackers, wikis, and collaborative spaces; Zoom Slides for generating visual presentations from meeting content; Zoom Sheets for building spreadsheets and analysis from meeting data; and Zoom Paper for drafting, editing, and formatting documents to produce written outputs from work conversations. These tools stay linked to original discussions, allowing real-time updates as decisions evolve and ensuring generated work has clear connection to the conversations that shaped it. The suite is available as a standalone offering or add-on for $10 per user per month with AI credits included, and is also part of a ZoomMate subscription.

Pros & Cons

✅ Pros

  • Converts meeting discussions into actionable deliverables
  • Includes Zoom Canvas, Slides, Sheets, and Paper applications
  • Stays linked to original discussions for real-time updates
  • Ensures generated work connects to source conversations
  • Available as standalone or add-on for $10/user/month
  • Includes AI credits in the pricing
  • Also part of ZoomMate subscription
  • Reduces context switching between applications
  • Integrates with Zoom AI Companion 3.0 ecosystem
  • Helps teams complete work faster through AI assistance

❌ Cons

  • Requires Zoom Workplace subscription
  • Currently focused on meeting-to-workflow conversion
  • May have learning curve for optimal utilization
  • Dependent on quality and clarity of input meetings
  • Limited to Zoom ecosystem integrations
  • May not support all specialized industry workflows
  • AI credits may be insufficient for heavy usage
  • Requires internet connectivity for full functionality
  • Standalone pricing may not suit all team sizes
  • Feature availability may vary by region

Best For

Teams and organizations using Zoom Workplace seeking to transform meeting discussions into completed work, reduce context switching, and improve productivity through integrated AI applications that maintain conversational context.

Tags
